ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var zipParam = attributes.queryParams.zip default "" var menopause = attributes.queryParams.menopause default "false" var limitParam = attributes.queryParams.limit default "10" var limitN = limitParam as Number default 10 var allProviders = [ { npi: "1245319599", name: "Dr. Priya Nair, MD, MSCP", credentials: ["MD", "MSCP"], specialty: "Obstetrics & Gynecology", menopauseCertified: true, city: "Irvine", state: "CA", zip: "92614", acceptingNewPatients: true, telehealth: true, graphScore: 0.95 }, { npi: "1477506141", name: "Dr. Linda Chen, MD", credentials: ["MD"], specialty: "Internal Medicine", menopauseCertified: false, city: "Irvine", state: "CA", zip: "92618", acceptingNewPatients: true, telehealth: false, graphScore: 0.72 }, { npi: "1659482301", name: "Dr. Amara Osei, DO, MSCP", credentials: ["DO", "MSCP"], specialty: "Family Medicine", menopauseCertified: true, city: "Santa Ana", state: "CA", zip: "92701", acceptingNewPatients: true, telehealth: true, graphScore: 0.91 }, { npi: "1083947220", name: "Dr. Rachel Kim, MD, MSCP", credentials: ["MD", "MSCP"], specialty: "Obstetrics & Gynecology", menopauseCertified: true, city: "Los Angeles", state: "CA", zip: "90025", acceptingNewPatients: false, telehealth: true, graphScore: 0.93 }, { npi: "1336271084", name: "Dr. Susan Park, MD", credentials: ["MD"], specialty: "Endocrinology", menopauseCertified: false, city: "San Francisco", state: "CA", zip: "94107", acceptingNewPatients: true, telehealth: true, graphScore: 0.78 }, { npi: "1922450088", name: "Dr. Samuel Levin, MD, MSCP", credentials: ["MD", "MSCP"], specialty: "Endocrinology", menopauseCertified: true, city: "Manhattan", state: "NY", zip: "10024", acceptingNewPatients: false, telehealth: true, graphScore: 0.87 } ] var filtered = allProviders filter (menopause != "true" or $.menopauseCertified == true) filter (sizeOf(zipParam) < 3 or $.zip[0 to 2] == zipParam[0 to 2]) var sorted = filtered orderBy -$.graphScore var clampedLimit = if (sizeOf(sorted) < limitN) sizeOf(sorted) else limitN var resultRows = if (clampedLimit == 0) [] else sorted[0 to (clampedLimit - 1)] --- { query: { zip: if (sizeOf(zipParam) > 0) zipParam else null, menopauseOnly: menopause == "true", limit: limitN }, 'total': sizeOf(filtered), returned: sizeOf(resultRows), providers: resultRows, provenance: { sources: ["CMS NPPES (synthetic slice, Mule iteration 2)", "MSCP credential list (synthetic)"], experienceApi: "pause-provider-directory-experience-api@1.0", servedBy: "mulesoft-cloudhub2" } }
